name: Sunflowers Bloom at Night | Himawari wa Yoru ni Saku RPG
description:
Welcome to the S.B.A.N RPG!

Requested by Reeecola

This is my 3rd all-in-one RPG bot, featuring a very famous piece of NTR media called Himawari wa Yoru ni Saku! You are free to explore any parts of the original doujin/animation! What you choose to do, what you want to change is entirely up to you!

Maybe you want to avenge Norihito? Or maybe, you want to make things worse? Perhaps, you want to do something different~? It's your choice, so I hope you have fun exploring different conclusions to the story~

DOUJIN | ANIMATION

P.S.: I didn't include the first few pages of the doujin in the timeline of events (`-w-)
